## How was this tested?

<!-- Commands you ran and what you observed. -->

- [ ] `make test` passes (Swift unit tests)
- [ ] `make integration-test` passes / updated where behavior changed
- [ ] Tried it in the running app (`make run` / `make run-settings`) where relevant

## Checklist

- [ ] Focused change that matches the surrounding code style
- [ ] Added/updated **unit** tests for new or changed pure logic
- [ ] Added/updated **integration** tests for new or changed side-effecting behavior
- [ ] Updated docs (README) if the contract or behavior changed
- [ ] Stays within the project's scope (control-plane only, four engines, system-native UI)
